notes: will-call; bring a vehicle that fits 60x60. Anderson is closer to Sunnyvale but pricier.
Amana 45624-K is the standard 60-deg V-bit; carbide, 1/2 shank
1/8 upcut spiral, 2-flute, 1/4 shank; consider buying a 2-pack since these snap
in-store pickup; double-sided cloth carpet tape, not the foam kind
Zinsser SealCoat or equivalent dewaxed shellac/sanding sealer
Minwax Helmsman Spar — exterior-rated; satin reads as clean wood, not glossy
#8 x 1-1/4 pan-head, zinc-plated; quantity is overkill for 2 screws
only needed if mounting location has no studs
only buy if Maker Nexus spoilboard is in poor shape; usually shop has this
foam brushes; throw away after each coat
